message:
test(fuzz): seed storage corpus with 218 coverage-discovered inputs

Mirror the earlier guard-corpus seeding pattern (a3607676) for the
storage fuzz targets: commit the first round of coverage-discovered
inputs accumulated by running storage_wbq_enqueue and
storage_commit_coalescer against the hardened code paths.

Counts:
- storage_wbq_enqueue/ — baseline seeds from the first fuzz run.
- storage_commit_coalescer/ — seeds captured after the single-request
  fast-path landed; exercises the new decision boundary between
  the direct-commit branch and the merge branch.

Standard cargo-fuzz blob convention applies: opaque libfuzzer
inputs, no rust source changes. Keeps CI/cron fuzz runs from
having to rediscover structure on every boot.
